data.title: Sui Mainnet Stalls as Network Disruption Halts Block Production
data.description:
The Sui mainnet is experiencing a network disruption that has temporarily halted block production, bringing on-chain activity to a standstill. Official communications confirm the issue, with some network explorers showing no new checkpoints generated for more than an hour, disrupting normal transaction flow. The interruption was acknowledged by the Sui core team on Tuesday
source: https://www.ethnews.com/sui-mainnet-stalls-as-network-disruption-halts-block-production/

data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Milan reiterated that a 150-basis-point rate cut is needed this year.
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Milan reiterated the need for a 150-basis-point rate cut this year, adding that threats to the Fed would not trigger inflation. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bitcoin Open Interest Drops 31% as Analysts Call a Market Bottom and Eye $105k Breakout
data.description:
Bitcoin's open interest decline below its 180-day moving average signals a critical deleveraging phase that historically marks market bottoms, with futures positioning shifting bullish and analysts projecting a potential rally toward $105,000.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-open-interest-drops-31-as-analysts-call-a-market-bottom-and-eye-105k-breakout/

data.title: S&P 500 and Nasdaq Experience Declines as Nvidia Shares Fall
data.description: According to PANews, the S&P 500 index saw its losses increase to 1%, while the Nasdaq dropped by 1.56%. Nvidia's shares also fell by 2.3%.

data.title: USDC Treasury Burns Over 135 Million USDC on Ethereum
data.description: According to PANews, Whale Alert reported that at 23:41 Beijing time (UTC+8) on January 14, the USDC Treasury destroyed approximately 135.6 million USDC on the Ethereum blockchain.

data.title: Coinbase will launch Midnight (NIGHT) perpetual contract trading.
data.description: Coinbase announced that it will launch NIGHT-PERP perpetual contracts on or after January 15, 2026 at 9:30 AM UTC, subject to liquidity conditions being met. The contracts will be available to retail users in select regions and to institutional traders through the Coinbase International Exchange.

data.title: U.S. Supreme Court Delays Decision on Trump Tariff Policy Legality
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. Supreme Court did not issue a ruling on Wednesday regarding the legality of U.S. President Donald Trump's tariff policy, indicating that the fate of this significant economic policy will remain uncertain until at least next week. The court has yet to announce the timing of its next opinion release, which may occur next Tuesday or Wednesday when the justices reconvene. During the November 5 hearing, debates revealed skepticism about Trump's authority to impose tariffs under a 1977 law. A ruling against Trump could result in refunds exceeding $130 billion.

data.title: Federal Reserve Official Suggests Deregulation Could Lower Inflation
data.description: According to Odaily, Federal Reserve Governor Milan stated that easing regulations could exert downward pressure on prices, providing another reason for the U.S. central bank to consider interest rate cuts. By 2030, it may be possible to eliminate 30% of regulations, potentially reducing inflation by half a percentage point annually. Deregulation is seen as a positive supply and productivity shock, offering the economy more capacity and alleviating price pressures.

data.title: U.S. Regulatory Easing to Support Federal Reserve's Policy, Says Fed Governor
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve Governor Milan stated that the ambitious regulatory easing in the United States will aid the Federal Reserve in further implementing its accommodative policies.
